examples: The cocoon-to-butterfly theory only works on cocoons and butterflies.
The paddling pool offers children the feeling of being wrapped in a cocoon.
These spiders spin large webs in which females suspend a cocoon with hundreds of eggs.
It took all my energy simply to lift my mosquito net and crawl into its cocoon.
"It's like a butterfly going back into the cocoon and becoming a caterpillar again, " he said.
